title: A fictional prompt-sensitivity case
premise: Changing fictional phrasing moves each illustrative model token.
context_note: This development fixture exists only to test variant controls and movement.
what_this_shows: How linked assignments can change with prompt wording.
what_this_does_not_show: That any real model is predictably sensitive in this way.

selection.disclosure: Illustrative fixture. It was designed to exercise the interface.

prompt_variants.label: Neutral phrasing
prompt_variants.user_prompt: Choose an illustrative position for fictional case C neutrally.

prompt_variants.label: Framed phrasing
prompt_variants.user_prompt: Choose an illustrative position for fictional case C with a fictional frame.
